mapper.select: SELECT d.id, d.datatablename, e.id AS id_error FROM device d LEFT JOIN error e ON e.id_device_group = d.id_device_group AND e.error_code = 1001 AND e.`status` = 1 AND e.is_delete = 0 WHERE d.`status` = 1 AND d.is_delete = 0 AND d.id_site = #{id_site} AND d.id_device_group = 19 LIMIT 1
SELECT m.id_device FROM ${datatablename} m WHERE m.id_device = #{id_device} AND m.time >= DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL -120 MINUTE) LIMIT 1

SELECT d.id, d.id_site, d.devicename, d.datatablename, d.job_tablename, d.last_updated, d.id_device_group, s.start_date_time, s.end_date_time, t.`value` AS timezone_value, e.id AS id_error FROM device d INNER JOIN site s ON s.id = d.id_site AND s.`status` = 1 INNER JOIN time_zone t ON t.id = s.id_time_zone LEFT JOIN error e ON e.id_device_group = d.id_device_group AND e.error_code = 1001 AND e.`status` = 1 AND e.is_delete = 0 WHERE d.`status` = 1 AND d.is_delete = 0 AND d.id_device_type IN (1, 3, 7, 17, 20) AND d.disable_alert = 1 AND d.id_site = #{id_site} GROUP BY d.id

SELECT MIN(sub.time) AS start_date, MAX(sub.time) AS end_date, TIMESTAMPDIFF(MINUTE, MIN(sub.time), MAX(sub.time)) AS duration, sub.is_no_comm FROM ( SELECT t1.time, t1.is_no_comm, SUM(t1.is_new_group) OVER (ORDER BY t1.time) AS grp FROM ( SELECT u.time, IF(u.nvmActivePower IS NULL, 1, 0) AS is_no_comm, CASE WHEN LAG(IF(u.nvmActivePower IS NULL, 1, 0)) OVER (ORDER BY u.time) = IF(u.nvmActivePower IS NULL, 1, 0) THEN 0 ELSE 1 END AS is_new_group FROM ${datatablename} u WHERE u.id_device = #{id_device} AND u.time >= DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL -2 HOUR) ORDER BY u.time ) t1 ) sub GROUP BY sub.grp, sub.is_no_comm ORDER BY end_date DESC

SELECT EXISTS( SELECT 1 FROM `alert` a INNER JOIN error e ON e.id = a.id_error AND e.is_delete = 0 AND e.`status` = 1 WHERE a.id_device = #{id_device} AND a.id_error = #{id_error} AND a.`status` = 1 AND a.is_delete = 0 LIMIT 1 ) AS totalRecord
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO `alert_queue`( `id_device`, `id_error`, `start_date`, `end_date`, `asset`, `capacity` ) VALUES ( #{id_device}, #{id_error}, #{start_date}, #{end_date}, #{asset}, #{capacity} ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE start_date = #{start_date}, is_queue = 0
SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID() AS id
mapper.select: SELECT a.id, a.id_device FROM `alert` a WHERE a.id_device = #{id_device} AND a.id_error = #{id_error} AND a.`status` = 1 AND a.is_delete = 0 LIMIT 1
